name: Hot Air 2
author: Poki
description: Ride the wind in Hot Air 2! In this physics-based puzzle game made by Nitrome, you play as a little balloon that has to make its way through all the levels! Using his a little propeller, you can create airstreams to move the balloon around. Be careful however, if you touch a wall or an enemy, the balloon will pop! There's 30 different levels to play and 3 bosses to beat - can you fly through them all? How to play Hot Air 2? Use the mouse to create airstreams and move the balloon! Who created Hot Air 2? Hot Air 2 is created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki: Bad Ice-Cream , Double Edged and Dangle How can I play Hot Air 2 for free? You can play Hot Air 2 for free on Poki. Can I play Hot Air 2 on mobile devices and desktop? Hot Air 2 can be played on your computer only.
